channel.title: ICYMI Law — AI & The Law Links
channel.description: Popular links about AI and the law shared recently on Bluesky.

item.title: If you thought the global financial crisis was bad…
item.description:
When the crash comes, stabilising markets will be easy compared with reordering society for AI, writes short-seller Carson Block

reposts: 7 · likes: 15

item.title: Ethical AI rows open way to wave of litigation
item.description:
Lawyers are at the forefront of debate and dispute over the technology’s lawful and responsible use

reposts: 6 · likes: 10

item.title: MOLON LAB AI
item.description:
The Next Level 6010 feels like a second skin. A 50/25/25 cotton-poly-rayon mix gives it that soft stretch and broken-in look. The Next Level tri-blend tee de...

reposts: 0 · likes: 20

item.title: Lawmakers Must Act Now to Prevent Armed Police Drones
item.description:
This is not science fiction. It’s not premature. If towns, cities, states, or the federal government want to act to reign in the emergence of armed police drones and robots, we have precious little ti...

reposts: 79 · likes: 181

item.title: Microsoft built supercomputer to help OpenAI infringe copyrights, NYT alleged
item.description:
NYT shifts OpenAI/Microsoft copyright claims after SCOTUS ruling against Sony.

reposts: 24 · likes: 72

item.title: OpenAI, Microsoft Sued by Publishers for Scraping Articles (1)
item.description:
Publishers that collectively own and operate nearly 400 newspapers are suing OpenAI Inc. and Microsoft Corp. for scraping their content to build products like ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot without permission or compensation.

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 1092 · likes: 3618

item.title: Kansas City bus agency wants to use AI facial recognition. Critics say it'll make riders less safe
item.description:
The Kansas City Area Transportation Authority could be one of the first in the nation to add AI-powered facial recognition cameras to its bus fleet this fall. National nonprofits and a KCATA commissio...

reposts: 50 · likes: 139

item.title: Nearly 400 local newspapers sue OpenAI, Microsoft over alleged copyright theft - New Jersey Globe
item.description:
The massive coalition of local newspaper publishers filed a federal lawsuit today against OpenAI and Microsoft, alleging the technology companies

item.title: Exclusive: Polls: Voters favor federal oversight of prediction markets
item.description:
Forty-eight percent of Republicans favor federal oversight, per the Republican poll.

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 364 · likes: 2073

item.title: Anthropic's Red Lines Are No Substitute for Public Law
item.description:
The right response to democratic dysfunction is not to cede governance to private corporations, argues David Gantt.

reposts: 9 · likes: 29

item.title: Judge allows US search warrant targeting executive's AI chatbot records
item.description:
A federal judge has denied a bid by a business executive charged in a securities fraud prosecution to block a search warrant seeking data from ChatGPT maker OpenAI, rejecting his arguments that the request would ​sweep in protected communications with his defense lawyers.

reposts: 9 · likes: 20

item.title: Legal tech firm sues US over order limiting foreign access to top-tier Anthropic models
item.description:
A U.S. legal technology company on Tuesday sued the federal government, challenging a directive by President Donald Trump’s administration that resulted in ​the artificial intelligence firm Anthropic halting access to two of its ‌most advanced models for users worldwide.

reposts: 6 · likes: 20

item.title: Gas stations are using AI to inflate prices, new lawsuit alleges
item.description:
A new federal lawsuit alleges that gas station companies across California are engaged in an illegal conspiracy, powered by AI software, to raise prices.

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 175 · likes: 452

item.title: First Amendment Questions for AI Transparency Laws
item.description:
State regulations mandating AI firms to disclose information may run afoul of the First Amendment. California is an early test case.

reposts: 5 · likes: 60

item.title: Slew Of California Gas Stations Illegally Used AI To Raise Prices, Lawsuit Claims
item.description:
The lawsuit cites a bill signed into law last year banning the use of common pricing algorithms.

🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 57 · likes: 143

item.title: Workday must face California lawsuit over AI bias in job screening tools
item.description:
Workday must face claims that its popular AI-powered human resources software weeded out job applicants at other companies in ways that violated California law and a ​federal ban on discrimination against workers with disabilities, a federal judge ruled on ‌Monday.

🔥 · reposts: 20 · likes: 45

item.title: Trump’s Chaotic AI and Cybersecurity Policy
item.description:
The administration’s gutting of agencies, contradictory impulses on regulating AI, and susceptibility to outside interests undermine trust in its capacity to oversee artificial intelligence risks.

🔥🔥 · reposts: 16 · likes: 35

item.title: Why states are walking back their own climate and energy laws, and what they could do instead
item.description:
Many steps that are good for clean energy also dovetail with federal priorities, from affordable housing to data centers and rural development.

🔥 · reposts: 13 · likes: 28

item.title: Did the US Government Just Set An AI Export Precedent by Blocking Mythos?
item.description:
The government's real decision isn't about one model. It's about which legal theory the government uses to govern all of them, writes Joseph Hoefer.

reposts: 8 · likes: 16

item.title: New global order: AI CEOs as heads of nation-states
item.description:
The world's most powerful heads of state gathered this week for the annual G7 summit, with AI CEOs seated and treated like heads of nation-states themselves.

item.title: Amazon investigating engineers who criticized AI data center expansion
item.description:
Five Amazon employees testified at Seattle City Council meetings where officials sought feedback on a year-long data center new construction pause.

item.title: The White House Is Making Up Its Rules for AI in Real Time
item.description:
Anthropic still can’t distribute Claude Mythos or Fable 5 after running afoul of the Trump administration. But no one can say exactly what the company did wrong.

item.title: New Brunswick woman sues OpenAI, alleging ChatGPT led to daughter's death | CBC News
item.description:
Alice Carrier died by suicide last year. Her mother says OpenAI failed to implement necessary safeguards despite knowing about the state of her daughter's mental health and even reinforced harmful vie...

item.title: Mississippi Judge Boots Lawyers From Both Sides of Case for ‘Blindly Relying on’ AI
item.description:
A federal judge in Mississippi booted all lawyers from both sides of a case on Tuesday over AI hallucinations in court filings.

🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 44 · likes: 132

item.title: SpaceX gets assist from DOJ in effort to toss NAACP air pollution lawsuit
item.description:
The DOJ is asking a Mississippi federal court to dismiss a lawsuit filed by the NAACP against Elon Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX.

🔥🔥 · reposts: 33 · likes: 86

item.title: Pension fund claims Microsoft duped investors about AI growth
item.description:
A proposed class-action lawsuit alleges Microsoft inflated its stock price last year amid the artificial-intelligence boom.

🔥🔥 · reposts: 26 · likes: 71

item.title: DOJ aims to block suit over Musk data center pollution, citing national security
item.description:
The Justice Department has moved to stop litigation over xAI's data center pollution in Mississippi, having also intervened in a separate lawsuit against Elon Musk's company in Colorado.

🔥 · reposts: 29 · likes: 43

item.title: Exclusive | OpenAI Investigated by Coalition of State Attorneys General
item.description:
The company was served with a subpoena seekingr documents covering a wide range of its activities and impact on users.

item.title: Meta reportedly enters agreement with firm that makes facial recognition tech for law enforcement
item.description:
The firm makes face recognition software for the U.S. Marshals Service.

item.title: Meta licensed ROC facial recognition, liveness for smart glasses project | Biometric Update
item.description:
Meta’s development of facial recognition for its smart glasses is drawing sharper scrutiny after reporting that the company licensed technology from ROC

🔥🔥 · reposts: 23 · likes: 58

item.title: Welcome to the AGI era of AI governance
item.description:
It's a one-way door and we weren't ready for it.

reposts: 2 · likes: 34

item.title: A Kill Switch for Frontier AI
item.description:
The government is using export control law to force Anthropic to cut access to its most powerful models. The legal authority is plausible but the facts remain murky.

reposts: 9 · likes: 19

item.title: A Court Has Ruled That Google Is Liable for False Statements Generated by AI Overviews
item.description:
The ruling holds that a company that designs, trains, operates, and manages an AI system must assume legal liability for any damages caused by the responses it generates.

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 685 · likes: 2352

item.title: Judge Learns Lawyers on Both Sides of Case Used AI, Cancels Trial, Kicks Everyone Off the Case
item.description:
When two AIs argue against each other, the legal system loses.

reposts: 60 · likes: 209

item.title: The Real Cost Of Cooling GPUs In Space Might Shock You
item.description:
Shedding heat will require ingenious new designs

reposts: 73 · likes: 181

item.title: Massive Effigy of Elon Musk Raised Over Times Square to Protest Grok
item.description:
Activists raised a 40-foot-tall inflatable Elon Musk in Manhattan to draw attention to the risk he allegedly poses to investors.

reposts: 48 · likes: 159

item.title: OpenAI hit with multistate probe into possible user harm as its IPO looms
item.description:
OpenAI received a subpoena from several states as part of a probe into the safety of customers using its chatbot as it prepares to offer stock to the public for the first time.

reposts: 40 · likes: 139
